channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 7th May
item.description:
Damaged sign post Please reinstate damaged sign post Standard TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 7th May
item.description:
ENWD Damaged sign post Please remove damaged signpost , correct signs and fill holes Standard TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th May
item.description:
Pothole CW 800x300x70mm approx Road closure Stats Not able to mark or measure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can't see priority sign due to vegetation, 7th May
item.description:
///asleep.items.assume The priority sign is not visible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Water leak, 7th May
item.description:
///feasting.other.cashier Water leaking out of ground/man hole cover on bridleway/footpath Have reported to cotswolds national landscape footpath people? And emailed cotswold district council. Not sure how I identity who's water it is? As in water company?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers put in place to protect public from debris caused by vehicle crashing into our garden. Garden wall now repaired and barriers and sandbags now no longer required, 7th May
item.description:
On the corner of Heron Close and Hatherley Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 205, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Overgrown trees along Cheltenham Road, 7th May
item.description:
Between Kings Head Pub and Tithe Barn. What3 words location ///down.trout.storm Also on Cheltenham Road opposite no 124.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Bike (possibly stolen?) thrown into river Chelt, 7th May
item.description:
Area impossible to access for public to retrieve bike, which looked in relative good condition

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jessop Avenue, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 very broken and wobbly slabs are trip hazard near outside sainsburys shop, 7th May
item.description:
The slabs on edge of pavement near sainsburys shop / balti walla shop
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135,137, Bath Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large potholes that are deep and wide, 7th May
item.description:
Along the whole of Chad Road there are four very large potholes and multiple smaller potholes making this road horrible to drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4a;4b, Chad Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
